stemHtml: What are the main components of Safety Management System (SMS)?

options.a: Safety Policy, Safety Risk Management, Safety Assurance and Safety Promotion.
options.b: Safety Policy, Safety Risk Organisation, Safety Awareness and Safety Promotion.
options.c: Safety Rules, Safety Risk Organisation, Safety Awareness and Safety Promotion.
options.d: Safety Regulations, Safety Risk Management, Safety Awareness and Safety Promotion.
